overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk nightclub with vibrant pink and cyan neon lighting. The camera moves from a narrow entrance corridor through the main dance floor and seating areas, ending at the main bar counter. The environment features futuristic industrial architecture, digital signage, graffiti art, and numerous NPCs. This is high-quality game engine footage, likely from Cyberpunk 2077.

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera approaching the bar counter up close. The neon-lit liquor shelves are visible behind the bar, with patrons seated on stools and a bartender working. The vibrant pink and cyan neon lighting dominates the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a narrow, neon-lit corridor into the expansive, vibrant heart of a cyberpunk nightclub. It begins by moving forward through a tight hallway defined by pink floor lighting and blue vertical strips, passing a digital advertisement screen and a bold neon sign before the space suddenly opens into the main club floor. As the camera pushes deeper into the venue, the view expands to reveal towering balconies and a disco ball textured wall, shifting past conversational NPCs and a graffiti-covered wall illuminated by blue neon tubes. The perspective then turns toward the main bar area, where the prominent Lizzy's Bar sign guides the movement toward a counter lined with stools and patrons. Finally, the camera closes in on the bar counter, ending the sequence with a detailed view of the bartender and glowing liquor shelves under a saturated wash of pink and cyan light.
